description: During construction, the developer must submit draw requests to the lender to get funds to pay contractors.

nodes.task_description: Collect invoices and lien waivers from all contractors for work completed during the period.

expected_outcome.value: All necessary backup documentation for the draw request is gathered.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the draw request package in the format required by the lender, including a summary of work completed.

expected_outcome.value: A complete and accurate draw request is assembled.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the lender's inspector to visit the site and verify the completed work.

expected_outcome.value: The site inspection is completed successfully, allowing the lender to release the funds.
